titles.title: Glory
titles.summary: Set in Haryana's competitive boxing world, Glory follows a renowned boxing coach and his two sons as Olympic dreams collide with buried family conflicts, crime and revenge.

titles.title: Undekhi: The Final Battle
titles.summary: Season 4 — the explosive finale of the Atwal family saga. Papaji vs Rinku in an all-out power struggle, while DSP Barun Ghosh closes in on justice.

titles.title: The House of the Spirits
titles.summary: Based on Isabel Allende's celebrated novel — three generations of the Trueba family navigate secret loves, political revolution and generational conflict against violent social upheaval in Latin America.

titles.title: Wuthering Heights
titles.summary: Emerald Fennell's bold reinterpretation of Emily Brontë's classic — a visually sumptuous, sensual retelling of Heathcliff and Catherine's doomed love set across windswept 18th-century England.

titles.title: Lawrence of Punjab
titles.summary: A controversial deep-dive into student politics, music, the Sidhu Moosewala murder case and the crime networks surrounding Lawrence Bishnoi — told through exclusive interviews and archival footage.

titles.title: Straight to Hell
titles.summary: Biographical drama tracing the rise of Japan's most famous — and controversial — celebrity fortune teller Kazuko Hosoki from Tokyo's nightlife scene to national fame over several decades.

titles.title: Raakaasa
titles.summary: A Telugu comedy-fantasy about an NRI returning home after a decade who unknowingly awakens a dangerous ancient force. A romantic pursuit quickly escalates into a battle for survival.

titles.title: Widow's Bay
titles.summary: A skeptical New England mayor trying to boost tourism on his island must navigate supernatural events and local legends of curses and sea spirits when myth becomes terrifying reality.

titles.title: The Kerala Story 2 Goes Beyond
titles.summary: Sequel to the 2023 film with a new narrative focusing on young women and their journeys. Directed by Kamakhya Narayan Singh with a new cast and story.

titles.title: Thai Maaman
titles.summary: A regional Tamil family drama centered on emotional bonds, family values and relationships — releasing on JioHotstar for Tamil audiences.
